title: Senior Fleet Manager at KTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at KTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
